Lower the dumbbell back down with control.

784.title: Seated Straight Leg Pull In
784.instructions:
Sit on a bench or the floor with legs extended.
Lean back slightly, hands supporting behind you.
Lift legs toward the chest using abdominal muscles.
Keep a straight back and engage the core.
Lower legs back down with controlled movement.

785.title: Shoulder Press with Band
785.instructions:
Stand on the center of a resistance band.
Hold the ends with both hands at shoulder height.
Press the band overhead, extending arms.
Engage core for stability.
Lower the band with control, repeat.

786.title: Shoulder Tap
786.instructions:
Begin in a handstand position.
Alternate tapping shoulders with hands.
Keep body straight and engage core.
Perform taps with controlled precision.

787.title: Side Bridge
787.instructions:
Lie on your side with elbow directly beneath your shoulder.
Lift hips off the ground, forming a straight line.
Engage core and hold the side plank position.
Maintain proper alignment and avoid sagging.
Repeat on the other side for balance.

788.title: Side Jack Knife
788.instructions:
Lie on your side with legs straight and stacked.
Place the bottom arm on the ground for support.
Lift the top leg and arm toward each other.
Engage the obliques for the side crunch.
Lower both arm and leg with control; repeat.

789.title: Side Lunge Touching Heel
789.instructions:
Stand with feet shoulder-width apart.
Step to the side, lunging deeply.
Touch the inner heel with the opposite hand.
Keep the opposite leg straight.
Push off, return to the starting position.

790.title: Side Lying External Rotation
790.instructions:
Lie on one side with the bottom arm extended.
Hold a dumbbell in the top hand.
Keep elbow close to the body.
Rotate the arm outward, lifting the weight.
Lower the dumbbell with control, repeat.

792.title: Side Plank Hip Drop
792.instructions:
Begin in a side plank position on your elbow.
Lower your hip toward the ground.
Lift your hip back up to the side plank.
Engage obliques and maintain a straight line.
Repeat, controlling the movement on each side.

793.title: Side Plank with Clam Shell Hold
793.instructions:
Start in a side plank position on your elbow and band above your knees.
Lift the top leg into a clamshell position.
Hold the leg in the raised position.
Maintain a straight line from head to heels.
Engage the side muscles for stability.

794.title: Side Plank with Dynamic Clam Shell
794.instructions:
Begin in a side plank position on your elbow and band above your knees.
Lift the top leg into a clamshell position.
Perform dynamic open-close motion with the top leg.
Keep the core engaged and hips stable.
Control the movement for optimal muscle activation.

795.title: Side Step Squat With Band
795.instructions:
Place a resistance band above knees.
Stand with feet shoulder-width apart.
Step to the side, squatting as you go.
Keep tension on the band throughout.
Alternate sides, maintaining good form.

796.title: Side to Side Box Jump
796.instructions:
Stand beside a box or platform.
Jump laterally onto the box.
Immediately jump off to the opposite side.
Land softly, absorbing the impact.
Repeat the side-to-side movement.

797.title: Side to Side Box Step
797.instructions:
Stand beside a box or step.
Step laterally onto the box with one foot.
Bring the other foot to meet it.
Step down to the opposite side of the box.

798.title: Side to Side Push Up
798.instructions:
Start in a plank position on hands.
Lower chest toward one hand for a push-up.
Push back up to the plank position.
Move chest toward the other hand for the next push-up.
Maintain a steady and controlled rhythm.

799.title: Single Arm Cable Bent Over Row
799.instructions:
Attach a handle to a low pulley on a cable machine.
Stand with feet shoulder-width apart with the foot on the working side, slightly behind you
Hold the handle with one hand.
Bend at the hips and row the handle towards your hip pocket

800.title: Single Arm Cable Chest Press
800.instructions:
Attach a handle to a low pulley on a cable machine.
Stand with feet shoulder-width apart, facing away from the machine.
Hold the handle with one hand at chest height.
Press the handle forward an slightly passed center, targeting your chest.

801.title: Cable Single Arm Crossover
801.instructions:
Set cable to highest position.
Stand with feet shoulder width apart.
Grab the handle with hand closest to cable
Pull cable across the body in a downward direction
Control the return and switch sides.

802.title: Cable Single Arm Shoulder Press
802.instructions:
Set cable at shoulder height.
Stand with feet shoulder-width apart.
Grab the handle with one hand at shoulder level.
Press the handle overhead, fully extending the arm.
Lower with control and repeat on the other side.

803.title: Single Arm Cable Tricep Extension
803.instructions:
Attach a rope to a high pulley on a cable machine.
Stand with feet shoulder-width apart facing away from the machine
Hold the rope with one hand behind your head
Extend your arm fully above your head targeting your triceps.

804.title: Single Arm DB Clean & Jerk
804.instructions:
Sit on a bench with back support.
Hold a dumbbell in one hand with a pronated grip.
Lower the dumbbell behind your head.
Keep the elbow steady, engage triceps to extend.
Control the descent, repeat on both arms.

805.title: Single Arm DB Overhead Squat
805.instructions:
Stand with feet shoulder-width apart, holding a dumbbell overhead in one hand.
Keep your arm extended, engaging your shoulder.
Lower into a squat position, maintaining balance.
Rise back up, focusing on stability and core strength.

806.title: Single Arm DB Tricep Extension
806.instructions:
Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in one hand.
Hinge at the hips, maintaining a flat back.
Keep upper arms close to your sides.
Extend forearms back in a controlled motion.
Squeeze triceps at the top, lower with control.

807.title: High Pulley Cable Single Arm Side Bend
807.instructions:
Set cable to a high pulley position.
Lie on your knees
Grab the handle with one hand.
Pull down while bending sideways at the waist, toward the cable.
Feel the side contract, then return to the upright position.

808.title: Single Arm Cable Incline Fly
808.instructions:
Attach handle to a cable machine at chest height.
Stand and face away from the machine.
Hold the handle with your arm extended to the sides and elbow slightly bent
Bring the handle in front of you maintaining a slight bend in the elbow, as your hand get closer to your midline, squeeze your chest.

809.title: Single Arm KB Clean
809.instructions:
Start with a kettlebell on the ground between your legs.
Hinge at the hips, grasp the kettlebell with one hand.
Explosively lift the kettlebell, bringing it to shoulder height.
Keep your core engaged and elbow close to the body.
Lower the kettlebell under control

810.title: Single Arm KB Floor Press
810.instructions:
Lie on your back with a kettlebell in one hand.
Bend your elbow and keep it close to the body.
Press the kettlebell upward, extending the arm.
Control the descent and repeat on the same side.
Switch arms for balanced muscle engagement.

811.title: Single Arm KB Jerk
811.instructions:
Begin with a kettlebell in one hand at shoulder height.
Dip into a partial squat and explosively push the kettlebell overhead.
Lock out your arm and engage your core.
Lower the kettlebell with control back to the shoulder.

812.title: Single Arm KB Press
812.instructions:
Start with a kettlebell in one hand at shoulder height.
Press the kettlebell overhead, extending your arm.
Keep your core engaged and avoid leaning.
Lower the kettlebell under control.

813.title: Single Arm KB Row
813.instructions:
Stand with a kettlebell in one hand.
Hinge at the hips, keeping a flat back.
Pull the kettlebell toward your hip.
Squeeze the shoulder blade at the top.
Lower the kettlebell with control; repeat on each side.

814.title: Single Arm KB Snatch
814.instructions:
Begin with a kettlebell on the ground in front of you.
Hinge at the hips and grasp the kettlebell with one hand.
Explosively lift the kettlebell, extending hips and pulling elbow high.
Catch the kettlebell overhead in a straight arm position.
Lower the kettlebell under control.

815.title: Single Arm KB Swing
815.instructions:
Stand with feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in one hand.
Hinge at the hips, swinging the kettlebell back between your legs.
Explosively drive your hips forward, swinging the kettlebell to shoulder height.
Keep a straight arm and engage your core.

816.title: Single Arm Landmine Row
816.instructions:
Secure one end of the bar in a landmine attachment.
Stand with feet shoulder-width apart.
Grab the free end of the bar with one hand.
Pull the bar towards your hip, keeping elbow close.
Squeeze the back muscles, then lower with control.

817.title: Single Arm Lateral Raise
817.instructions:
Stand with a dumbbell in one hand, arm at your side.
Lift the dumbbell to the side, keeping the arm straight.
Raise the dumbbell to shoulder height.
Control the descent and repeat for lateral shoulder engagement.

818.title: Single Arm Overhead KB Squat
818.instructions:
Hold a kettlebell in one hand overhead.
Stand with feet shoulder-width apart.
Lower into a squat, keeping the kettlebell stable.
Rise back up for a challenging single-arm overhead squat.

819.title: Single Arm Pronated DB Tricep Extension
819.instructions:
Sit on a bench with a dumbbell in one hand.
Hold the dumbbell with a pronated grip (palm facing down).
Lower the dumbbell behind your head, keeping the elbow stable.
Extend the arm upward, engaging the triceps.
Control the descent, repeat on both arms for balance.

820.title: Single Arm Push Up
820.instructions:
Begin in a plank position with one hand on the ground.
Keep the other hand behind your back.
Perform a push-up, maintaining balance.
Switch hands after set is complete

821.title: Single Arm Cable Rear Delt Fly
821.instructions:
Attach a handle to a belly button level pulley on a cable machine.
Stand with feet shoulder-width apart, facing the machine.
Hold the handle with one hand in front of you
With a slight bend in your elbow, drive your elbow back maintaining the bend and squeezing your shoulder blade back and to the middle

822.title: Single Arm Cable Rear Delt Row
822.instructions:
Attach a handle to a low pulley on a cable machine.
Stand with feet shoulder-width apart with the foot on the working side, slightly behind you
Hold the handle with one hand.
Bend at the hips and row the handle towards your hip pocket

823.title: Single Arm Cable Seated Row
823.instructions:
Attach a handle to a low pulley on a cable machine.
Sit on a bench facing the machine.
Hold the handle with one hand, arm extended in front of you
Row the handle toward your hip, engaging your back muscles.

824.title: Single Arm Cable Seated High Row
824.instructions:
Attach a handle to a high pulley on a cable machine.
Sit on a bench facing the machine.
Hold the handle with one hand, arm extended.
Pull the handle toward your shoulder, engaging your lats

825.title: Single Arm Cable Standing Row
825.instructions:
Attach a handle to a low pulley on a cable machine.
Stand with feet shoulder-width apart.
Hold the handle with one hand.
Bend at the hips and row the handle toward your hip.

826.title: Single Leg Ball Curl
826.instructions:
Lie on your back with a medicine ball under one foot.
Lift your hips off the ground, forming a bridge.
Curl the stability ball towards your glutes using one leg.
Extend the leg back out, engaging hamstrings.

827.title: Single Leg Heels Elevated Hip Thrust
827.instructions:
Lie on your back with one foot elevated on a bench or step.
Place the other foot flat in the air.
Lift your hips towards the ceiling, engaging your glutes.
Keep the elevated foot in line with the bent knee.
Lower your hips back down and repeat, then switch legs.

828.title: Single Leg High Box Squat
828.instructions:
Stand in front of a high box or bench.
Lift one foot off the ground.
Squat down, sitting on the box.
Touch the box lightly, then stand back up.

829.title: Single Leg Push Off
829.instructions:
Place one foot on a box or elevated surface.
Push off with the elevated leg.
Extend the hip and knee, lifting the body.
Swing the opposite knee up.
Land softly on the starting leg, control the descent.

830.title: Single Leg Skater Squat
830.instructions:
Stand on one leg with the other leg lifted behind.
Lower the body into a single-leg squat.
Extend the free leg back and around panted foot.
Keep the chest up and back straight.
Push through the standing heel to return.

831.title: Snatch Behind the Neck Overhead Press
831.instructions:
Start with a barbell behind your neck, hands wide.
Dip into a partial squat and explosively lift the barbell overhead.
Lower the bar under control.

832.title: Snatch Deadlift
832.instructions:
Stand with feet hip-width apart, gripping the barbell.
Keep a wide grip and chest up.
Lift the barbell with an explosive hip hinge.
Extend hips and pull the bar straight up.
Lower the barbell with control, focusing on the hip hinge.

833.title: Snatch from Blocks
833.instructions:
Begin with a barbell on blocks just above knee height.
Stand with feet hip-width apart, gripping the barbell.
Explosively lift the bar, extending hips and pulling elbows high.
Catch the bar in an overhead squat position.
Stand up

834.title: Snatch Grip Deadlift
834.instructions:
Stand with feet wider than hip-width, gripping the barbell with a wide overhand grip.
Keep chest up, back flat, and shoulders over the bar.
Lift the barbell with an explosive hip hinge, extending hips and knees.
Maintain a straight back throughout the lift.
Lower the barbell under control.

835.title: Snatch High Pull From Hang
835.instructions:
Start with a barbell, hanging just above the knees.
Grip the barbell with hands slightly wider than shoulder-width.
Keep your back straight, chest up, and engage your core.
Explosively lift the barbell, pulling it towards your chest.
Elbows should lift higher than shoulder level, then lower with control.

836.title: Snatch Pull
836.instructions:
Stand with feet hip-width apart, gripping the barbell.
Keep a wide grip and chest up.
Lift the barbell with an explosive hip hinge.
Pull the barbell straight up, keeping elbows high.
Lower the barbell under control.

837.title: Snatch Push Press
837.instructions:
Start with a barbell on shoulders.
Dip into a partial squat.
Explosively push the barbell overhead.
Lock out your arms at the top.
Lower the bar under control.

838.title: Snatch Shrug
838.instructions:
Start with feet hip-width apart, holding a barbell.
Perform a slight dip at the knees.
Explosively extend hips, shrugging shoulders.
Keep arms straight, lifting barbell upward.
Control the descent, repeat the movement.

839.title: Sots Press
839.instructions:
Begin with a barbell on your back, feet shoulder-width apart.
Lower into a deep squat position, keeping heels on the ground.
Press the barbell overhead while remaining in the deep squat.
Keep your back straight and chest up throughout the movement.
Lower the barbell back down and repeat the Sots press.

840.title: Spider Crawl
840.instructions:
Start in a plank position on hands.
Lift one foot, bringing knee toward the elbow.
Move the foot back to the starting position.
Repeat with the other foot.
Maintain a steady and controlled crawl movement.

841.title: Split Clean
841.instructions:
Begin with a barbell on the ground in front of you.
Hinge at the hips, gripping the barbell with hands shoulder-width apart.
Explosively lift the bar, extending hips and pulling elbows high.
Catch the bar in a split squat position.
Stand up.

842.title: Split Jerk
842.instructions:
Start with a barbell at shoulder height.
Dip into a partial squat, then explode up.
Split your legs, one forward and one backward.
Push the barbell overhead, locking out your arms.
Bring feet back together and stand tall.

843.title: Split Snatch
843.instructions:
Begin with a barbell on the ground in front of you.
Hinge at the hips, gripping the barbell with hands wider than shoulder-width.
Explosively lift the bar, extending hips and pulling elbows high.
Catch the bar overhead in a split squat position.
Stand up.

844.title: Split Squat with KB
844.instructions:
Stand with one foot forward and the other back, holding kettlebells in each hand.
Lower your back knee toward the ground in a split stance.
Keep your front knee directly above your ankle.
Push through the front foot to return to the starting position.

845.title: Squat Abduction With Band
845.instructions:
Place a resistance band around thighs.
Stand with feet shoulder-width apart.
Perform a squat, keeping tension on the band.
At the bottom of the squat, extend knees outward.
Return the kness and squat again.

846.title: Squat Jerk
846.instructions:
Begin with a barbell at shoulder height.
Dip into a partial squat.
Explosively push the barbell overhead.
Catch the bar in a full squat position.
Stand up.

847.title: Stability Ball Pike with Knee Tuck
847.instructions:
Assume a plank position with feet on a stability ball.
Lift hips and roll the ball toward your chest.
Engage core for a pike position.
Roll the ball back to plank, then bring knees to chest.

848.title: Staggered Hands Push Up
848.instructions:
Start in a plank position.
Place one hand slightly forward and the other back.
Lower your chest toward the ground.
Push back up, engaging chest and arms.
Switch hand positions for each repetition.

849.title: Standing Alternating DB Press
849.instructions:
Stand with a dumbbell in each hand at shoulder height.
Press one dumbbell overhead while keeping the other at shoulder height.
Lower the pressed dumbbell while pressing the other one.
Continue alternating between arms.

850.title: Standing Barbell Bicep Curl
850.instructions:
Stand with feet shoulder-width apart.
Hold a barbell with palms facing forward.
Curl the barbell toward your shoulders.
Keep elbows close to your body.
Lower the bar with control to full arm extension.

851.title: Standing Barbell Calf Raise
851.instructions:
Stand with feet hip-width apart.
Place a barbell on your upper back.
Lift heels off the ground, rising onto toes.
Squeeze calf muscles at the top.
Lower heels down with control for a stretch.

852.title: Standing Barbell Press Behind the Neck
852.instructions:
Start with a barbell resting on your upper back.
Grip the barbell with hands wider than shoulder-width.
Press the barbell overhead, locking out your arms.
Lower the barbell behind your neck with control.

853.title: Standing Bent Over Single Arm DB Tricep Extension
853.instructions:
Stand with a flat back, feet shoulder-width apart.
Hinge at the hips, holding a dumbbell in one hand.
Keep the upper arm close to the head.
Extend the arm back, engaging the triceps.
Lower the dumbbell with control, switch arms.

854.title: Standing Bent Over Two Arm DB Tricep Extension
854.instructions:
Stand with feet shoulder-width apart, knees slightly bent.
Hinge at the hips, keeping a flat back.
Hold a dumbbell in each hand, arms bent at 90 degrees.
Keep upper arms stationary throughout the movement.
Lower the dumbbells with control, repeat.

855.title: Standing Bicep Stretch
855.instructions:
Stand with feet shoulder-width apart.
Extend one arm straight behind you, holding onto a supportive structure.
Hold the stretch and breathe deeply.

856.title: Standing Bradford Press
856.instructions:
Start with a barbell at shoulder height in front of you.
Press the barbell overhead with palms facing forward.
Lower the barbell behind your neck.
Press it back overhead to the starting position.

857.title: Standing Broad Jump
857.instructions:
Start with feet shoulder-width apart.
Bend at the knees, lowering into a partial squat.
Explosively jump forward, extending the hips.
Swing arms forward for momentum.
Land with soft knees, absorbing the impact.

858.title: Cable Standing Wood Chop
858.instructions:
Set cable at a high position.
Stand perpendicular to the cable with feet shoulder-width apart.
Hold the handle with both hands above the shoulder.
Rotate your torso, pulling the handle diagonally across the body and down.
Control the movement, engaging core muscles.

859.title: Standing DB Calf Raise
859.instructions:
Stand with a dumbbell in each hand.
Lift heels off the ground, rising onto toes.
Squeeze calf muscles at the top.
Keep a stable and controlled motion.
Lower heels down with control for a stretch.

860.title: Standing DB Hand Squeeze
860.instructions:
Stand with a dumbbell in each hand at your sides.
Loosen the grip of the dumbell so it rests in your fingertips.
Curl the dumbell back into your palm and squeeze.
Hold the squeeze for a few seconds.
Release the tension and repeat.

861.title: Standing DB Reverse Curl
861.instructions:
Stand with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing toward you.
Keep elbows close to your body.
Curl the dumbbells upward toward your shoulders.
Squeeze the biceps at the top of the curl.
Lower the dumbbells with control to full extension.

862.title: Standing DB Straight Arm Front Delt Raise Above Head
862.instructions:
Stand with a dumbbell in one hand, arms at your sides.
Lift the dumbbell straight in front of you above your head.
Keep your arms extended with a slight bend in the elbows.
Lower the dumbbell back to the starting position.

863.title: Standing DB Upright Row
863.instructions:
Stand with feet shoulder-width apart.
Hold a dumbbell in each hand, arms down by side.
Lift the dumbbells straight up to shoulder height.
Keep elbows higher than the wrists.
Lower the dumbbells with control, repeat.

864.title: Standing Front Barbell Raise Overhead
864.instructions:
Stand with feet shoulder-width apart, holding a barbell in front.
Keep a slight bend in your elbows and lift the barbell straight overhead.
Extend your arms fully, engaging the front deltoids.
Lower the barbell back down with control.

865.title: Standing Landmine Press
865.instructions:
Set up the landmine attachment.
Stand with feet shoulder-width apart.
Hold the landmine bar at shoulder height.
Press the bar overhead, extending your arms.
Lower the bar under control, maintaining stability.

866.title: Standing Overhead Barbell Tricep Extension
866.instructions:
Stand with feet shoulder-width apart.
Hold a barbell overhead with both hands.
Keep elbows close to the head.
Lower the barbell behind your head.
Extend arms upward, engaging triceps.

867.title: Standing Overhead DB Tricep Extension
867.instructions:
Stand with feet shoulder-width apart.
Hold a dumbbell with both hands overhead.
Keep elbows close to the head.
Lower the dumbbell behind your head.
Extend arms upward, engaging triceps.

868.title: Standing Palm In Single Arm DB Press
868.instructions:
Stand with a dumbbell in one hand at shoulder height.
Rotate your palm inward so it faces your head.
Press the dumbbell overhead, extending your arm.
Lower the dumbbell with control.

869.title: Standing Palms Up Barbell Behind the Back Wrist Curl
869.instructions:
Stand with a barbell behind your back, palms facing up.
Rest your forearms on your glutes or thighs.
Curl the barbell upward, flexing your wrists.
Lower the barbell back down with control.

870.title: Standing Quad Stretch
870.instructions:
Stand with feet hip-width apart.
Lift your right foot towards your glutes, holding the ankle.
Keep knees close together and engage your core.
Hold the stretch, then switch legs and repeat.

871.title: Cable Standing Single Arm Curl
871.instructions:
Set cable at a low position.
Stand with feet shoulder-width apart.
Grab the handle with one hand, palm facing up.
Keep elbow stationary, curl handle towards shoulder.
Squeeze biceps, then lower with control.

872.title: Standing Single Arm DB Curl Over Incline Bench
872.instructions:
Stand beside an incline bench, holding a dumbbell.
Place the non-working arm on the bench for support.
Curl the dumbbell towards your shoulder.
Keep the elbow stationary and engage the biceps.
Lower the dumbbell with control; repeat on each arm.

873.title: Standing Single Arm DB Tricep Extension
873.instructions:
Stand with feet shoulder-width apart.
Hold a dumbbell in one hand overhead.
Keep elbow close to the head.
Lower the dumbbell behind your head.
Extend arm upward, engaging triceps.

874.title: Star Jump
874.instructions:
Stand with feet hip-width apart.
Bend knees slightly, keeping back straight.
Explosively push through heels, extending hips and knees.
Swing arms upward for momentum.
Land softly, bending knees to absorb impact.

875.title: Static Clam Shell Hold
875.instructions:
Lie on your side with knees bent and band slightly above your knees.
Lift the top knee, keeping feet together.
Hold the position with the knee raised.
Engage the outer hip muscles.
Maintain stability throughout the hold.

876.title: Step Up with Knee Raise
876.instructions:
Stand in front of a step or bench.
Step up onto the platform with one foot.
Lift the opposite knee toward your chest.
Engage core for balance and stability.
Step back down and repeat on the other side.

877.title: Stiff Leg Deadlift
877.instructions:
Stand with feet hip-width apart, holding a barbell in front of you.
Keep a slight bend in your knees and maintain a straight back.
Hinge at the hips, lowering the barbell toward the ground.
Lower the barbell as far as flexibility allows, keeping back straight.
Engage your hamstrings and glutes to return to the upright position.

878.title: Stiff Legged DB Deadlift
878.instructions:
Stand with a dumbbell in each hand, feet hip-width apart.
Hinge at the hips, keeping a slight bend in your knees.
Lower the dumbbells towards the ground, maintaining a straight back.
Stand back up,

879.title: Stir the Pot
879.instructions:
Assume a plank position on an exercise ball.
Use forearms to roll the ball in a circular motion.
Engage core and maintain a straight body line.
Rotate in both directions for a full challenge.

880.title: Straight Leg Barbell Good Morning
880.instructions:
Stand with feet shoulder-width apart, a barbell across your upper traps.
Keep a slight bend in your knees and maintain a straight back.
Hinge at the hips, lowering your torso towards the ground.
Lower until you feel a stretch in your hamstrings.
Engage your hamstrings and glutes to return to an upright position.

881.title: Straight Leg Bicycle Crunch
881.instructions:
Lie on your back with legs extended and hands behind your head.
Lift your right leg and simultaneously bring left elbow toward it.
Switch, bringing right elbow toward lifted left leg.
Keep legs straight and low to the ground throughout.
Perform in a controlled, rhythmic manner for core engagement.

882.title: Straight Leg Boat
882.instructions:
Sit on the floor with legs extended.
Lean back slightly, lifting legs off the ground.
Form a V-shape with your torso and legs.
Keep arms straight and parallel to the ground.
Engage core for balance and hold the position.

883.title: Straight Leg Crunch
883.instructions:
Lie on your back with legs extended and hands behind your head.
Lift your upper body forward.
Engage core for a controlled crunch.
Lower upper body with control; repeat.

884.title: Straight Legged Hip Raise
884.instructions:
Lie on your back with legs at a 90 degree angle and arms by your sides.
Lift hips towards the ceiling, engaging glutes and hamstrings.
Keep core tight, forming a straight line from shoulders to heels.
Lower hips back down without touching the ground.

885.title: Strict Handstand Push Up
885.instructions:
Begin in a stable handstand position against a wall.
Keep arms straight and body in a vertical line.
Lower body by bending elbows until head touches the ground.
Push back up to the starting position.

886.title: Strict Toe to Bar
886.instructions:
Hang from a pull-up bar with arms fully extended.
Lift your legs straight up towards the bar.
Keep your legs straight without using momentum.
Lower your legs back down with control.

887.title: Suitcase Crunch
887.instructions:
Lie on your back with straight legs and hands behind your head.
Lift both knees and bring elbows towards each other.
Contract abs, lifting head and shoulder blades off the ground.
Return to starting position and switch sides, repeating the motion.

888.title: Suitcase Deadlift
888.instructions:
Stand with feet hip-width apart, kettlebell in one hand.
Lower with control, keeping a stable core throughout.
Lift the kettlebell by extending hips and knees.

889.title: Sumo Deadlift
889.instructions:
Stand with feet wider than shoulder-width in a sumo stance.
Grip the barbell with hands inside your legs.
Keep a flat back, chest up, and engage your core.
Lift the barbell by extending your hips and knees.
Lower the barbell with control, maintaining proper form throughout.

890.title: Sumo Deadlift Block Pull
890.instructions:
Set up a barbell on blocks or a raised surface.
Stand with feet wider than shoulder-width in a sumo stance.
Grip the barbell with hands inside your legs.
Keep a flat back, chest up, and engage your core.
Lift the barbell by extending your hips and knees, then lower with control.

891.title: Sumo KB Deadlift
891.instructions:
Stand with feet wider than shoulder-width, toes turned out.
Hold a kettlebell with both hands between legs.
Hinge at hips, keeping back straight and chest up.
Lower the kettlebell towards the ground, maintaining a neutral spine.
Drive through heels, extending hips and returning to the upright position.

892.title: Superman Hold
892.instructions:
Lie facedown on the ground with arms extended in front of you.
Lift your arms, chest, and legs off the ground simultaneously.
Keep your head in a neutral position, looking down.
Hold the lifted position, focusing on engaging your back muscles.
Lower back down with control, then repeat for the desired duration.

893.title: Supine Twist
893.instructions:
Lie on your back with arms extended to the sides.
Bring your right knee towards your chest.
Rotate your hips and lower the right knee across your body.
Keep your shoulders on the ground for a spinal twist.
Hold the stretch, then switch legs and repeat on the other side.

894.title: Supported Calf Stretch
894.instructions:
Stand facing a wall with hands placed on the wall.
Step forward with one foot and press into the wall.
Keep the front leg straight and place weight onto front leg.
Hold the stretch and then switch legs.

895.title: Svend Press
895.instructions:
Stand with feet shoulder-width apart, holding a weight between hands.
Position hands in front of chest, pressing them together.
Engage chest muscles and press the weight plate straight out.
Squeeze chest at the top, keeping arms slightly bent.
Return to the starting position and repeat for desired reps.

896.title: Swimmer
896.instructions:
Lie facedown on the ground with arms extended in front of you.
Lift your arms, chest, and legs off the ground simultaneously.
Begin flutter-kicking your legs and perform alternating arm movements.
Keep your head in a neutral position and continue the swimming motion for the desired duration.

897.title: Swiss Ball Leg Curl
897.instructions:
Lie on your back with heels on a Swiss ball.
Lift hips, forming a straight line from shoulders to heels.
Curl the ball towards your glutes using your legs.
Keep hips raised, engaging hamstrings and glutes.
Extend legs, then repeat for a controlled leg curl.

898.title: Swiss Ball Single Leg Curl
898.instructions:
Lie on your back with heels on a Swiss ball.
Lift hips, forming a straight line from shoulders to heels.
Lift one foot off the ball, extending the leg.
Curl the ball towards your glutes using the other leg.
Keep hips raised, engaging hamstrings and glutes. Alternate legs for each curl.

899.title: Tall Muscle Snatch
899.instructions:
Stand tall with a barbell in front, hands wide apart.
Lift the barbell by shrugging your shoulders.
Pull the barbell upward, keeping it close to your body.
Lower the barbell with control.

900.title: Tate Press
900.instructions:
Lie on a bench, holding dumbbells directly over chest.
Rotate wrists, so palms face feet and elbows point outward.
Lower dumbbells to chest, elbows bent at a 90-degree angle.
Press the dumbbells back up, squeezing chest muscles.
Keep core engaged and wrists rotated throughout.

901.title: Toe Tap
901.instructions:
Begin in a plank position on your elbows
Tap one foot out to the side, keeping the other grounded.
Alternate tapping feet while engaging core muscles.

902.title: Toe Touch
902.instructions:
Lie on your back with legs at a 90 degree angle and arms reaching overhead.
Lift upper body off the ground, reaching fingertips toward toes.
Keep legs straight and core engaged throughout the movement.
Lower back down with control, emphasizing abdominal contraction.

903.title: TrapBar Deadlift
903.instructions:
Stand inside a trap bar with feet hip-width apart.
Bend at the hips and knees to grip the handles.
Keep a flat back and chest up.
Lift the trap bar by straightening hips and knees.
Lower the bar back down with control

904.title: TrapBar Jump
904.instructions:
Stand inside a trap bar with feet hip-width apart.
Bend at the hips and knees to grip the handles.
Explosively jump upward, lifting the trap bar.
Land softly, bending your knees to absorb the impact.

905.title: Tuck Crunch
905.instructions:
Lie on your butt with knees bent and feet flat on the ground.
Place hands behind your body for stability.
Extend legs away from chest.
Bring knees back to your chest and repeat.

906.title: Twisting Mountain Climber
906.instructions:
Start in a plank position with hands under shoulders.
Drive one knee towards the opposite elbow, engaging obliques.
Return to plank position and switch to the other knee.
Keep a quick, alternating pace while maintaining core stability.

907.title: Cable Twisting Single Arm Chest Press
907.instructions:
Attach a handle to a low pulley on a cable machine.
Stand or sit  perpindicular to the machine 
Hold the handle with one hand at chest height.
Press the handle forward while twisting your torso to the opposite side of the hand which your holding the handle

908.title: Cable Twisting Single Arm Overhead Press
908.instructions:
Attach a handle to a low pulley on a cable machine.
Stand with feet shoulder-width apart, facing the machine.
Hold the handle with one hand about shoulder height
Press the handle upward while twisting your torso.

909.title: Cable Twisting Single Arm Standing Chest Press
909.instructions:
Attach a handle to a low pulley on a cable machine.
Stand with feet shoulder-width apart, facing away from the machine.
Hold the handle with one hand at chest height.
Press the handle forward while twisting your torso.

910.title: Two Arm DB Preacher Curl
910.instructions:
Sit at a preacher bench with a dumbbell in each hand.
Position upper arms against the pad, elbows at 90 degrees.
Curl the dumbbells towards your shoulders, keeping upper arms still.
Squeeze biceps at the top of the movement.
Lower the dumbbells with control, fully extending arms before the next curl.

911.title: Two Arm KB Clean
911.instructions:
Start with a kettlebell on the ground between your legs.
Hinge at the hips, grasping the kettlebell with both hands.
Explosively lift the kettlebell, bringing it to shoulder height.
Keep a straight back and engage your core.
Lower the kettlebell with control

912.title: Two Arm KB Jerk
912.instructions:
Begin with a kettlebell in both hands at shoulder height.
Dip into a partial squat and explosively push the kettlebell overhead.
Lock out your arms and engage your core.
Lower the kettlebell with control back to the shoulder.

913.title: Two Arm KB Press
913.instructions:
Hold a kettlebell in each hand at shoulder height.
Press both kettlebells overhead, extending your arms.
Keep your core engaged and avoid leaning.
Lower the kettlebells under control.

914.title: Two Arm KB Row
914.instructions:
Stand with feet shoulder-width apart, holding a kettlebell in each hand.
Hinge at hips, keeping a flat back and knees slightly bent.
Pull the kettlebells towards your hips, squeezing shoulder blades.
Keep elbows close to the body during the rowing motion.
Lower the kettlebells with control, fully extending arms before the next row.

915.title: Two Arm Pronated DB Tricep Extension
915.instructions:
Lie on a flat bench, holding a dumbbell with both hands.
Start with arms fully extended over your chest.
Lower the dumbbell behind your head by bending at the elbows.
Keep upper arms stationary, focus on triceps engagement.
Extend elbows, returning to the starting position.

916.title: U Ab
916.instructions:
Lie on your back with legs straight and arms holding a weight, extended overhead.
Lift legs and upper body simultaneously, forming a "U" shape.
Engage core muscles, reaching fingertips towards toes.
Lower back down with control, maintaining tension in abs.

917.title: Underhand Front Raise
917.instructions:
Stand with a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing forward.
Lift the dumbbells straight in front of you.
Keep your arms extended with a slight bend in the elbows.
Raise the dumbbells to shoulder height.
Lower the dumbbells back down with control.

918.title: Upright Row with Band
918.instructions:
Stand on the center of a resistance band.
Hold the ends with an overhand grip, hands shoulder-width apart.
Lift the band straight up, leading with elbows.
Keep the band close to the body.
Lower with control, engaging shoulder muscles.

919.title: Upward Facing Dog
919.instructions:
Begin lying face down with palms near your chest.
Press through your hands, lifting your chest and upper body.
Keep legs straight, toes pointed, and thighs off the ground.
Arch your back, opening the chest and looking upward.
Hold the pose.

920.title: W Raise
920.instructions:
Lie face down on an incline bench.
Hold a dumbbell in each hand, palms facing down.
Lift both arms in a "W" shape to shoulder height.
Squeeze your shoulder blades together at the top.
Lower the dumbbells with control

921.title: Waiter's Carry
921.instructions:
Stand tall, holding a weight in one hand at shoulder height.
Keep shoulder blades back and down, maintaining good posture.
Walk with a controlled gait, balancing the weight like a waiter.
Engage core for stability and prevent leaning to one side.

922.title: Walking Barbell Lunge
922.instructions:
Begin standing with a barbell across your upper traps.
Take a step forward with your right foot into a lunge position.
Lower your body until both knees are bent at a 90-degree angle.
Push off your right foot to bring your left foot forward.
Repeat the walking lunge, alternating legs with each step.

923.title: Walking Knee Hug
923.instructions:
Stand tall with feet hip-width apart.
Lift right knee towards chest, hugging it with both hands.
Take a step forward while maintaining the knee hug.
Repeat alternately, walking in a controlled manner.
Engage core for balance and flexibility.

924.title: Walking Lunge with Overhead Weight
924.instructions:
Hold a weight overhead with one hand.
Take a step forward into a lunge position.
Lower back knee toward the ground.
Push off the front foot, bringing the back leg forward.
Alternate legs, maintaining overhead weight position.

925.title: Wall Walk
925.instructions:
Start in a plank position facing away from the wall.
Walk feet up the wall, bringing body into an inverted position.
Walk hands toward the wall to bring chest closer.
Reverse the movement, walking hands away and feet down.
Maintain core stability and control throughout.

926.title: Weighted Bench Dip
926.instructions:
Position yourself on parallel bars or a sturdy bench.
Hold a weight on your lap with legs extended.
Lower body by bending elbows until arms are at 90 degrees.
Push back up, fully extending arms.

927.title: Weighted Chin Up
927.instructions:
Hang from a pull-up bar with a weighted belt or vest.
Grip the bar with palms facing you, slightly narrower than shoulder-width.
Pull your body up towards the bar, leading with your chest.
Keep elbows close to the body and chin above the bar.
Lower down with control, fully extending arms before the next repetition.

928.title: Weighted Crunch
928.instructions:
Lie on your back with knees bent and hold a weight against your chest.
Lift head and shoulders off the ground, engaging your core.
Focus on contracting abdominal muscles throughout the movement.
Lower back down with control.

929.title: Weighted Plank
929.instructions:
Start in a plank position with a weight on your upper back.
Engage core muscles to maintain a straight line from head to heels.
Ensure shoulders are directly above wrists.
Hold the plank for the desired duration.

930.title: Weighted Pull Up
930.instructions:
Attach weight to a dip belt or use a weighted vest.
Grip the pull-up bar with palms facing away, slightly wider than shoulder-width.
Pull your body up, leading with your chest, chin above the bar.
Keep elbows close to the body throughout the movement.
Lower down with control, fully extending arms before the next repetition.

931.title: Weighted Push Up
931.instructions:
Assume a push-up position with a weight plate on your upper back.
Maintain a straight line from head to heels.
Lower your chest towards the ground with control.
Push back up to the starting position.

932.title: Weighted Sissy Squat
932.instructions:
Stand with feet hip-width apart, holding a weight behind you.
Go onto toes and lean back slightly and lower your body into a squat.
Keep heels on the ground and knees over toes.

933.title: Wide Grip Barbell Bench Press
933.instructions:
Lie on a flat bench with a wide grip on the barbell.
Lower the barbell to your chest, keeping elbows at a 90-degree angle.
Press the barbell back up to the starting position.

934.title: Wide Grip Bench Press
934.instructions:
Lie on a bench with a wide grip on the barbell.
Lower the barbell to your chest, keeping elbows wide.
Press the barbell back up, extending your arms.

935.title: Wide Grip Lat Pulldown
935.instructions:
Sit at the lat pulldown machine with a wide grip.
Grip the bar wider than shoulder-width apart.
Keep chest up, pull the bar down to chest level.
Squeeze shoulder blades together at the bottom.
Control the upward movement, engaging lats.

936.title: Wide Grip Pull Up
936.instructions:
Grasp the pull-up bar with a wide overhand grip.
Hang freely, arms fully extended.
Pull your body up, leading with your chest towards the bar.
Keep elbows wide and engage upper back muscles.
Lower down with control, fully extending arms before the next pull-up.

937.title: Wide Grip Rear Pull Up
937.instructions:
Grasp the pull-up bar with a wide overhand grip.
Hang freely, arms fully extended.
Pull your body up, leading with your head in front of the bar.
Focus on squeezing the shoulder blades together at the top.
Lower down with control, fully extending arms before the next pull-up.

938.title: Wide Grip Standing Barbell Curl
938.instructions:
Stand with feet shoulder-width apart, grip the barbell with wide hands.
Keep elbows close to your torso, palms facing forward.
Curl the barbell towards your shoulders, contracting biceps.
Squeeze biceps at the top of the movement.
Lower the barbell with control, fully extending arms before the next curl.

939.title: Wide Incline Push Up
939.instructions:
Position hands wider than shoulder-width on an elevated surface.
Create a straight line from head to heels, forming an incline.
Lower your chest towards the surface, maintaining a controlled descent.
Push back up to the starting position, engaging chest muscles.

940.title: Wide Legged Forward Fold
940.instructions:
Stand with feet wider than shoulder-width apart.
Hinge at the hips, reaching hands towards the ground.
Keep a slight bend in your knees.
Hold the forward fold position.

941.title: Wide Push Up
941.instructions:
Start in a plank position with hands wider than shoulder-width.
Maintain a straight line from head to heels.
Lower your chest towards the ground, keeping elbows wide.
Push back up to the starting position.

942.title: X Band Walk
942.instructions:
Place a resistance band around your ankles.
Stand with feet shoulder-width apart, creating tension in the band.
Take lateral steps to the side, maintaining tension in the band.
Keep a slight bend in the knees and maintain a straight posture.

943.title: Yates Row
943.instructions:
Stand with a barbell using an underhand grip, slightly wider than shoulder-width.
Hinge at the hips, keeping a slight bend in the knees.
Pull the barbell towards your lower chest, squeezing shoulder blades.
Keep elbows close to your body throughout the rowing motion.
Lower the barbell with control, fully extending arms before the next row.

944.title: Zercher Squat
944.instructions:
Start with the barbell in the crook of your elbows.
Stand with feet shoulder-width apart.
Lower into a squat, keeping a straight back.
Engage your core and glutes.
Rise back up.

945.title: Zottman Curl
945.instructions:
Hold a dumbbell in each hand with palms facing forward (supine grip).
Curl the dumbbells towards your shoulders, contracting biceps.
Rotate your wrists at the top, turning palms to face downward (pronated grip).
Lower the dumbbells with control, maintaining the pronated grip.
Rotate wrists back to the starting supine position for the next curl.
